'''Oko E''' was a resort world in the [[Oko system]]. It was known for its "wild-water" rafting on rivers of molten [[Sulfur/Legends|sulfur]]. The [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] partook in this activity, likening it to maneuvers he performed on the elusive [[Teljkon Vagabond]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].<ref name="SOL">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>
